creator: tgen@deepbone.net
text:
Kan's patch does indeed fix the problem for me (xfce4-session quitting
as soon as a Mozilla application is started). It'd be interesting to
know how you found the issue in libSM though; my backtraces only showed
dbus_malloc() before _exit(1).

Cheers,
-- 
	Thomas E. Spanjaard
	tgen@netphreax.net
	tgen@deepbone.net
